description.value: Target at medium range makes [[/save type=will]]. Calculate net successes (targeting - save). If you have more net successes, extraplanar creatures are sent to their home plane. Native creatures are sent to a harmless demiplane. Target reappears when weave ends.

system.effect: Target at medium range makes Will save. Calculate net successes (targeting - save). If you have more net successes, extraplanar creatures are sent to their home plane. Native creatures are sent to a harmless demiplane. Target reappears when weave ends.
system.weavingRoll: Space Potential + Space Mastery / Time Potential + Time Mastery
